findings.message:
Reentrancy in FinancialPoolManager._selectWinner(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#333-391):
	External calls:
	- (success,None) = address(winner).call{value: pool.goodValue}() (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#376)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- pool.winnersCount ++ (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#382)
	FinancialPoolManager.pools (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#72) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- FinancialPoolManager._selectWinner(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#333-391)
	- FinancialPoolManager.activatePool(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#188-205)
	- FinancialPoolManager.createPool(string,uint256,uint256,uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#149-182)
	- FinancialPoolManager.deletePool(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#211-219)
	- FinancialPoolManager.getAllParticipants(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#503-510)
	- FinancialPoolManager.getParticipantCount(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#479-481)
	- FinancialPoolManager.getParticipantInfo(uint256,address) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#489-496)
	- FinancialPoolManager.getPool(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#398-429)

	- FinancialPoolManager.leavePool(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#250-274)
	- FinancialPoolManager.notParticipant(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#133-139)
	- FinancialPoolManager.onlyPoolOwner(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#109-115)
	- FinancialPoolManager.participateInPool(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#225-244)
	- FinancialPoolManager.payInstallment(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#280-327)
	- FinancialPoolManager.poolStatus(uint256,FinancialPoolManager.PoolStatus) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#117-123)
	- pool.status = PoolStatus.Finished (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#388)
	FinancialPoolManager.pools (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#72) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- FinancialPoolManager._selectWinner(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#333-391)
	- FinancialPoolManager.activatePool(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#188-205)
	- FinancialPoolManager.createPool(string,uint256,uint256,uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#149-182)

	- FinancialPoolManager.leavePool(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#250-274)
	- FinancialPoolManager.notParticipant(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#133-139)
	- FinancialPoolManager.onlyPoolOwner(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#109-115)

findings.name: reentrancy-eth

findings.message:
FinancialPoolManager.payInstallment(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#280-327) uses a dangerous strict equality:
	- participant.payments == duePayments && ! participant.received (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#315)
findings.name: incorrect-equality

findings.message:
FinancialPoolManager.poolStatus(uint256,FinancialPoolManager.PoolStatus) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#117-123) uses a dangerous strict equality:
	- require(bool,string)(pools[poolId].status == expectedStatus,Pool status does not allow this operation) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#118-121)
findings.name: incorrect-equality

findings.message:
Reentrancy in FinancialPoolManager._selectWinner(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#333-391):
	External calls:
	- (success,None) = address(winner).call{value: pool.goodValue}() (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#376)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- PoolFinished(poolId) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#389)
	- WinnerSelected(poolId,winner,pool.goodValue) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#384)
findings.name: reentrancy-events

findings.message:
FinancialPoolManager.payInstallment(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#280-327) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- require(bool,string)(msg.value == pool.installmentValue,Incorrect payment amount) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#289-292)
	- require(bool,string)(pool.activationDate > 0,Pool activation date not set) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#293-296)
	- require(bool,string)(participant.payments < duePayments,No payment due at this time) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#303-306)
	- participant.payments == duePayments && ! participant.received (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#315)
findings.name: timestamp

findings.message:
FinancialPoolManager.activatePool(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#188-205) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- require(bool,string)(pool.totalParticipants >= pool.minParticipants,Not enough participants to activate) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#196-199)
findings.name: timestamp

findings.message:
Version constraint ^0.8.19 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- VerbatimInvalidDeduplication
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.19 (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#8)
findings.name: solc-version

findings.name: low-level-calls
